working_on: Routine task P5-09: Philosophy of science seed — thirteenth routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; depends_on [P5-01a] satisfied since S-0051 (P5-01a's verifier-column fix closed). Apply via engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper (fifth routine-mode load-bearing exercise per ADR 0055; first was S-0066, second was S-0068, third was S-0070, fourth was S-0071); verify with engine/tools/check_target.py --task-id P5-09 and engine/tools/validate.py.
declared_scope: Author product/seed-graph/migrations/0080_seed_science_part1.sql with the methodology-anchored core of philosophy of science at the granularity principle. Nine coverage clusters: foundation (philosophy_of_science, scientific_method, scientific_theory); confirmation and induction (problem_of_induction — Hume; hypothetico_deductivism; bayesianism_confirmation; paradox_of_the_ravens — Hempel); demarcation and structure (demarcation_problem; falsificationism — Popper 1934/59; paradigm — Kuhn 1962 SSR; paradigm_shift; research_programme — Lakatos 1970); theories of explanation (scientific_explanation; deductive_nomological_model — Hempel-Oppenheim 1948; inference_to_the_best_explanation — Lipton/Harman; unification_theory_of_explanation — Friedman/Kitcher); realism and antirealism (scientific_realism; constructive_empiricism — van Fraassen 1980; no_miracles_argument — Putnam/Boyd; pessimistic_meta_induction — Laudan 1981); underdetermination and observation (underdetermination; duhem_quine_thesis; theory_ladenness_of_observation — Hanson/Kuhn/Feyerabend); laws and models (law_of_nature; scientific_model); reduction and unity (reductionism_in_science; multiple_realizability_in_science); values in science (value_free_ideal). 28 nodes total, ~32-36 within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges in a layered DAG rooted at philosophy_of_science. Append per-session narrative entry to product/seed-graph/migrations/ROUTING.md. Apply migration via engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper per ADR 0055. Confidence_level composition target: 100% INTERPRETED. PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite). Cross-domain edges deferred to P5-11 per phase_5.md T2-G #1 (problem_of_induction ↔ epistemology on Hume's problem and inductive justification; scientific_realism ↔ metaphysics on natural kinds and laws; multiple_realizability_in_science ↔ philosophy of mind on functionalism and anti-reductionism; value_free_ideal ↔ ethics on values in inquiry; underdetermination/duhem_quine_thesis ↔ epistemology on holism and theory-choice; verificationism allusion ↔ philosophy of language on the verification criterion of meaningfulness — handled in S-0071 narrative). Two-commit pattern. End state: P5-09 complete in auto_target.json; check_target.py --task-id P5-09 passes both criteria (migration_applied + validate_passes). graph_version 13→14. Sub-range slots 0081-0089 left reserved. phase: P_5
outcome_summary: Phase 5 philosophy-of-science methodology-anchored core seed (P5-09) lands at S-0073 — thirteenth routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; the philosophy-of-science single-task subdomain is fully seeded at the methodology-anchored core. **No boot freshness intervention required** (first observable confirmation of the S-0072 parent-FF wrapper change): the worktree (cranky-banach-0f5903) was at origin/main HEAD (b1b6c5a post-S-0072 close) at session start — routine_boot_freshness.py exited silently (exit 0, no FF needed); routine_lifecycle_push.py's post-push parent-FF advanced parent main from b1b6c5a → 032018e (eager-claim) → 8920e95 (deliverable) → close. **One canonical-home decision**: 27 nodes + 30 edges authored, vs. the 28 + 32 originally planned; the originally-planned twenty-eighth concept (problem_of_induction) was already seeded under epistemology (P5-01a, domain=epistemology); per phase_5.md T2-G #4 (canonical-home convention), the node was dropped from this migration along with the two within-confirmation-cluster edges that would otherwise involve it (scientific_method → problem_of_induction; problem_of_induction → bayesianism_confirmation — both cross-domain in the current graph and deferred to P5-11). 27 nodes + 30 edges across nine clusters per phase_5.md T1-B: foundation (3 — philosophy_of_science, scientific_method, scientific_theory); confirmation (3 — hypothetico_deductivism, bayesianism_confirmation, paradox_of_the_ravens — Hempel 1945's central technical puzzle); demarcation and structure (5 — demarcation_problem, falsificationism (Popper 1934/59), paradigm (Kuhn 1962 SSR — the disciplinary matrix), paradigm_shift, research_programme (Lakatos 1970 — synthesis of falsificationism and paradigm-relativism)); theories of explanation (4 — scientific_explanation, deductive_nomological_model (Hempel-Oppenheim 1948), inference_to_the_best_explanation (Harman 1965 / Lipton 1991/2004), unification_theory_of_explanation (Friedman 1974 / Kitcher 1981, 1989)); realism and antirealism (4 — scientific_realism, constructive_empiricism (van Fraassen 1980 The Scientific Image), no_miracles_argument (Putnam 1975 / Boyd 1983), pessimistic_meta_induction (Laudan 1981 'A Confutation of Convergent Realism')); underdetermination and observation (3 — underdetermination, duhem_quine_thesis (Duhem 1906 / Quine 1951 'Two Dogmas of Empiricism'), theory_ladenness_of_observation (Hanson 1958 Patterns of Discovery / Kuhn 1962 / Feyerabend 1975)); laws and models (2 — law_of_nature (regularity, necessitarian, dispositional-essentialist views), scientific_model (Suppes/van Fraassen/Giere/Cartwright model-based view)); reduction and unity (2 — reductionism_in_science (Nagel 1961 the canonical Nagelian model), multiple_realizability_in_science (Putnam 1967 → Fodor 1974)); values in science (1 — value_free_ideal). 6-tier layered DAG rooted at philosophy_of_science with three cross-cluster bridges (falsificationism → paradigm reflecting the central Popper-Kuhn debate; duhem_quine_thesis → paradigm reflecting Quinean confirmational holism converging with historicist paradigm-relativism; duhem_quine_thesis → theory_ladenness_of_observation reflecting the holist→Hanson-Kuhn-Feyerabend chain) plus the load-bearing T1→T4 skip-tier scientific_theory → paradigm; 27/27 INTERPRETED; 0% EXTRACTED; 0% SYNTHETIC; within-domain edges only. graph_version 13→14. **Fifth load-bearing routine-mode exercise of engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper per ADR 0055** (first S-0066 P5-07a; second S-0068 P5-06; third S-0070 P5-07b; fourth S-0071 P5-08) — and notably the **first routine-mode exercise of the wrapper's exit-3 SQL-error path**: the first apply attempt failed with nodes_pkey UNIQUE-violation on the canonical-home conflict; the wrapper handled the failure cleanly (exit 3, body rolled back atomically by the migration's BEGIN/COMMIT wrap, no schema_migrations row inserted, post-failure snapshot via validate.py --export-snapshot confirmed zero gv=14 nodes and unchanged settings.graph_version=13); after the canonical-home fix (drop conflicting node + two cross-domain edges; update contract block tier listing and counts; re-run pre-apply Python regex+DFS integrity check — 27 nodes parsed, 30 edges parsed, all endpoints in node set, no duplicates, no cycles), the second apply succeeded cleanly: shape verified twice (once at staging, once at apply), body applied via psycopg autocommit, recorded in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations as version 20260505222912. The wrapper's behavior under SQL error (exit 3, atomic rollback, no recording) is now durably confirmed in routine context — additional T1-A surface beyond the well-formed-success cases of the prior four exercises. check_target.py --task-id P5-09 PASS both criteria (migration_applied PASS; validate_passes PASS, exit 1 = soft-warns only). validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 349 soft-warns (342 missing_rigor_score continuing the partial-seed pattern per phase_5.md T2-C with running total +27 from S-0071's 316 corresponding to the 27 newly seeded science nodes; 7 issue_collision: #1, #2 upstream MemPalace plus 5 routine-collision flags from open Issues #20, #21, #22, #23, #24 — Issue #16 closed at S-0072, dropping collision count by 1 from S-0071's 8). Two-commit pattern continued (eager-claim 032018e + deliverable 8920e95 + this close). 0 in-band Issues filed; 0 HANDOFF entries. The canonical-home conflict on problem_of_induction was a fix-in-context per CLAUDE.md 'Default to fix-in-context' — the fix was understood (drop conflict node + two cross-domain edges; update contract block) and the additional work fit within the session budget. Sub-range slots 0081-0089 left reserved. All three lifecycle pushes succeeded via routine_lifecycle_push.py (eager-claim, deliverable, close — wrapper's T1-A long-confirmed since S-0061; apply_migration's T1-A now confirmed across five routine fires S-0066/S-0068/S-0070/S-0071/S-0073 including the durably-confirmed first-routine-exercise SQL-error path). Forward state: P5-09 complete; philosophy-of-science subdomain fully seeded at the methodology-anchored core; P5-10 (Service nodes — depends_on [P5-01a]) is the only remaining parallel-eligible task; next routine fire's eligibility walk picks P5-10 in walk order. Phase 5 progress: 13/16 tasks complete; 13 routine sessions consumed of 18 max_sessions per phase_5.md T1-C — 3 sub-tasks remaining (P5-10, P5-11 cross-bridges, P5-12 closeout) — 5-session buffer comfortable.

scope_delivery.explanation: Mostly. Declared scope was 28 nodes / ~32-36 edges across the nine philosophy-of-science clusters; delivered 27 nodes and 30 edges. The single delta is the omission of problem_of_induction (and its two within-confirmation-cluster edges scientific_method → problem_of_induction and problem_of_induction → bayesianism_confirmation), driven by an in-session canonical-home conflict discovered at apply time: problem_of_induction was already seeded under epistemology in P5-01a (domain=epistemology). Per phase_5.md T2-G #4 (canonical-home convention) and T2-G #1 (cross-domain edges are P5-11's exclusive responsibility), the right resolution is to omit the duplicate node and defer the cross-domain edges to P5-11 — exactly what was done. The within-domain DAG remains intact at the science layer: hypothetico_deductivism → bayesianism_confirmation provides the canonical within-confirmation-cluster pedagogical_prerequisite for Bayesian (the parallel problem_of_induction → bayesianism_confirmation edge from epistemology lands at P5-11). 27 nodes + 30 edges authored across the nine clusters per the cluster decomposition (3 foundation + 3 confirmation + 5 demarcation-and-structure + 4 explanation + 4 realism + 3 underdetermination-and-observation + 2 laws-and-models + 2 reduction-and-unity + 1 values-in-science = 27). Three cross-cluster bridges (falsificationism → paradigm; duhem_quine_thesis → paradigm; duhem_quine_thesis → theory_ladenness_of_observation) plus the load-bearing T1→T4 skip-tier scientific_theory → paradigm tie the nine clusters into a coherent within-domain 6-tier DAG. PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite used; already in registry); ROUTING.md per-session narrative appended at the chronological tail. Migration applied to paideia-dev via the apply_migration.py wrapper after one in-session re-author cycle (first apply: fail-fast on the duplicate-key error, atomic rollback; second apply: clean); recorded in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations as version 20260505222912. graph_version 13→14 honored. confidence_level distribution 27/27 INTERPRETED matches phase_5.md T2-B 70% floor with margin. Pre-apply Python regex+DFS integrity check (27 nodes parsed, 30 edges parsed, all endpoints in node set, no duplicates, no cycles) clean before the second apply. check_target.py --task-id P5-09 passes both criteria. validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 349 soft-warns. Two-commit pattern continued (eager-claim 032018e + deliverable 8920e95 + close). Sub-range slots 0081-0089 left reserved. **Fifth load-bearing routine-mode exercise of apply_migration.py wrapper succeeded cleanly after the in-session canonical-home fix**: continues to confirm the subprocess-bypass pattern from ADR 0055 works repeatably in routine context across five independent fires, AND additionally confirms the wrapper's exit-3 SQL-error rollback path durably (the wrapper correctly fail-fast'd on the duplicate-key violation, the migration's BEGIN/COMMIT wrap rolled back the body atomically, no schema_migrations row was inserted on the failed first attempt, the second apply with the corrected migration recorded cleanly). **First observable confirmation of the S-0072 routine close-out apparatus** (parent FF post-push and post-close worktree sweep): no boot freshness intervention required at session start (worktree was at origin/main HEAD post-S-0072), and the parent-FF chain through the three lifecycle pushes worked cleanly.

commits.summary: seed philosophy of science methodology-anchored core — 27 nodes, 30 edges (P5-09)
